testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Glimpses of our satisfied customers who trust AtomX Pay

reviews.text: I used to send money to my parents in India through traditional money transfer operators, and it always took a couple of days. With AtomX Pay, my transfers reach them in minutes via UPI — no hidden fees, no delays. It's the easiest way I've ever supported my family.

With traditional services, I never knew how much my family would actually receive — exchange rates and fees kept changing. AtomX Pay is different. What I see is what they get, every time, and the transfer is complete in minutes.

When my brother had a medical emergency, a bank wire would have taken 2–3 days. AtomX Pay delivered the money in under 15 minutes. Knowing I can send funds instantly when my family needs me most has made all the difference.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about AtomX Pay

questions.question: How do I send money with AtomX Pay?
questions.answer: You can initiate a transfer directly through our app or website. Simply: Select the country and amount you want to send, Choose your recipient, Fund the transfer using your preferred payment method, Track the transfer in real time until it reaches the recipient.

questions.question: What payment methods are supported?
questions.answer: AtomX Pay supports ACH, Wire, RTP, FedNow, and Debit Cards in the US, as well as UPI, IMPS, and RTGS in India, along with additional local payment rails where available.

questions.question: How long does a transfer take?
questions.answer: Transfers are typically completed in 15 minutes when funds are sent through RTP, Zelle, or FedNow, which settle in real time. For transfers made via ACH or Wire, the 15-minute settlement window applies once the funds are received in your AtomX Pay account.

questions.question: Why should I trust AtomX Pay?
questions.answer: Compliance first: AtomX Pay is fully licensed and compliant with international AML/CFT regulations. Transparent pricing: We offer guaranteed Google exchange rates with no hidden spreads. Secure technology: All transfers are powered by blockchain rails with bank-grade encryption. Proven track record: Trusted by global Indians for fast, reliable cross-border remittances.

questions.question: What are the transfer fees?
questions.answer: We charge a low, flat service fee per transfer, clearly displayed before you confirm your transaction. There are no hidden charges or exchange mark-ups — you always get the exact rate shown.

questions.question: Which documents are required for KYC?
questions.answer: To comply with regulatory requirements, you'll need to provide: A valid government-issued photo ID (passport, Aadhaar, driver's license, or equivalent), Proof of address (utility bill, bank statement, or rental agreement), In some cases, additional documents may be requested depending on the amount and destination country.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Why Blockchain Rails Matter
content: For decades, cross-border payments have been slow, expensive, and dependent on multiple intermediaries. Traditional rails weren't designed for real-time, transparent settlement. Even the largest financial institutions acknowledge the need for change.
As Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase, puts it:
"Blockchain has the potential to deliver significant improvements in the movement of money — making payments faster, cheaper, and more transparent."
Lael Brainard, former Federal Reserve Governor, highlights the same pain point:
"The current cross-border payments system is too slow and too expensive. New technologies, including blockchain, can help improve efficiency and reduce costs for households and businesses."
Industry leaders see blockchain as the foundation of a more efficient global payment system. Daleep Singh, Chief Global Economist at PGIM, notes:
"Blockchain technology allows financial institutions to address inefficiencies in cross-border payments by enabling near real-time settlement and reducing reliance on intermediaries."
And Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock, emphasizes its future role:
"We see blockchain as part of the future infrastructure of financial markets. It enables delivery-versus-payment settlement and can bring greater speed and safety to cross-border payments."

For everyday users, this means faster transfers, lower costs, and complete transparency. Instead of waiting days and paying hidden fees, blockchain rails deliver money securely in minutes, with final settlement you can trust. At AtomX Pay, we harness these advantages to make global remittances simple, fair, and instant.
